blockingIssues.description: internal/rpc/deployments/handlers.go still emits `logs` SSE payloads as single BuildLog objects (`writeEvent("logs", l)`), while the dashboard consumer expects `logs` payloads as BuildLog[] (`web/dashboard/src/lib/api.ts` and `web/dashboard/src/pages/DeploymentDetailPage.tsx`), so live log streaming remains broken.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For API/RPC refactors and follow-up fixes, require explicit payload-shape compatibility checks against known consumers (not only event names/routes/status codes).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-structural-blocking restored SSE event names but still shipped an incompatible `logs` payload shape in internal/rpc/deployments/handlers.go:306,349 versus dashboard expectations in web/dashboard/src/lib/api.ts:804,821 and web/dashboard/src/pages/DeploymentDetailPage.tsx:48-54.
